{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322022430D2D4B609A69276E9AD9F"}"},"total":95},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615467861142848318","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"圆梦师风格文，超好看，第一个世界给我留下深刻印象，太喜欢了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773117502,"group_id":"7608624095613176856","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/9gIXn2rT8wrzrv6t93mO0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/97e37d28319940cea97fe84ade64617e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702234&x-signature=jl0CSbPdlt1YuBn0594hdenbaus%3D","user_id":"50318949316","user_name":"越来越好超开心～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50318949316","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608624095613176856","book_info":{"abstract":"【爆笑】+【乐子人】+【整活】+【无女主】

陆季渊成为时之狭间乐子人公司唯一员工！去各个世界完成任务。

公司给的技能画风十分离谱：
【男女转化】
【强者鉴定术】
【思维弹幕】
【松松你的括约肌】

第一个世界【射雕英雄传】，他把杨康变女人，嫁给了郭靖，生了个蝈蝈（郭过）。
第二个世界【小李飞刀】，他帮三千斤重的大欢喜菩萨，睡服了小李飞刀李寻欢。
第三个世界【笑傲江湖】，他让林平之把辟邪剑谱印成传单，全江湖人手一本。

江湖、天下被他折腾得鸡飞狗跳，反派破防，正派崩溃，发布任务的配角怀疑人生。

陆季渊摊手：“我只是一个平平无奇的乐子人，顺便帮江湖找点乐子。”

又名：
《我在武侠世界当搅屎棍》
《江湖乱不乱，渊哥说了算》

武侠世界变沙雕乐园，那些年我们嗑过的CP，全被他玩坏了。

至于那些意难平？
他顺手救了。
毕竟搞事归搞事，乐子人也是有原则的：整乐子第一，任务第二，顺便让所有人都别想好好过日子。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a86f61835c295a1313a5ecbc15232317","author":"颓废老狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7608624095613176856","book_name":"诸天万界乐子人，开局杨康变女人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8c0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7608624155767865880","read_count":"75005","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200739"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"86","tags":"男频衍生,武侠,诸天万界,开局,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/489bc8e1a8614b204f0ca294c71feda2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301470&x-signature=LTzPo0BYXcQcHPB0tjHuKqLY%2Fgk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2962534940549308","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322022430D2D4B609A69276E9AD9F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_cou
